name: Velocity Slim Joggers
description: Lightweight tapered joggers with a 4-way stretch fabric and zip ankle cuffs. Perfect for workouts or everyday wear.

name: Cloudstitch Oversized Hoodie
description: Ultra-soft fleece hoodie with a relaxed drop-shoulder fit. Features a kangaroo pocket and ribbed cuffs.

name: NovaBuds Pro Wireless Earbuds
description: Active noise cancellation, 32-hour total battery life, and IPX5 water resistance. Includes a wireless charging case.

name: LuminaTab 10 Smart Tablet
description: 10-inch display, octa-core processor, 128GB storage. Great for streaming, reading, and light productivity.

name: Arcadia Ceramic Diffuser
description: Whisper-quiet ultrasonic diffuser with a hand-painted ceramic shell and 7-color ambient light mode. Runs up to 8 hours.

name: Woven Linen Throw Blanket
description: 100% stone-washed linen throw, 50x60 inches. Breathable, pre-washed for softness, and available in four earthy tones.

name: Glow Theory Vitamin C Serum
description: 15% L-ascorbic acid formula with hyaluronic acid and vitamin E. Brightens, firms, and evens skin tone over 4 weeks.

name: BareSolve SPF 50 Tinted Moisturizer
description: Lightweight tinted moisturizer with mineral SPF 50. Blurs pores, hydrates for 24 hours, and suits all skin tones.

name: IronCore Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description: Single dumbbell adjusts from 5 to 52.5 lbs in 2.5 lb increments. Replaces 15 individual dumbbells. Sold as a pair.

name: TrailSync GPS Running Watch
description: Built-in GPS, heart rate monitor, VO2 max tracking, and up to 14 days of battery life. Water-resistant to 50 meters.
